misc.title: #ONEPIECE1179 Imu prepares to leave the Holy Land, but three of the Five Elders—Warcury, Ju Peter, and Mars—strongly oppose it. V. Nasjuro and Garling, on the other hand, are resigned to the fact that
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1179 Imu prepares to leave the Holy Land, but three of the Five Elders—Warcury, Ju Peter, and Mars—strongly oppose it. V. Nasjuro and Garling, on the other hand, are resigned to the fact that Imu can’t be stopped. The way the Five Elders are trying to stop Imu suggests that something negative will happen to him if he leaves the Holy Land—especially Pangea Castle: Ju Peter: Imu-sama!! You must not leave “Pangea Castle”!! Imu: I leave the Holy Land in your hands. Elder (I can't specifically identify who said this but its one of the Five Elders): Imu-sama! But you… going down to the lower world is…! Garling: We don’t have the authority to stop him…!! Mars: But…!! Warcury: Imu-sama! If you leave this castle…! V. Nasjuro: We don’t need to remind him of that… Ju Peter: He’s already prepared for it… No one can stop him now… (Imu goes to the center of a big Abyss - the magic circle - and vanishes) ------------------------ Looks like my observation was right. It seems Imu will have some negative effects/demerits (nerf) in leaving the Holy land, hence the blood on his lips at the end of the chapter.

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1179 Imu has a small flashback with the most important one piece scenes in his own view: - Xebec, Roger death, Shanks stealing the Nika fruit, Whitebeard death/Ace being Roger son, Luffy and
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1179 Imu has a small flashback with the most important one piece scenes in his own view: - Xebec, Roger death, Shanks stealing the Nika fruit, Whitebeard death/Ace being Roger son, Luffy and Teach(where he slays the posters). We see every big moment in Imu view

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1179 *The Five Elders are reasoning with Imu to stop going to the lower world.* Warcury: Don't tell us, you're heading for Elbaph?! Shepherd: Please stop... you going down to the lower world
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1179 *The Five Elders are reasoning with Imu to stop going to the lower world.* Warcury: Don't tell us, you're heading for Elbaph?! Shepherd: Please stop... you going down to the lower world is...!! *Garling enters the Room of Authority* Garling: What a deliberate thing to say... How long do you think the Holy Land will remain secure? Mars: Garling... Garling: With Shamrock's return, the situation's somewhat got under control but... the "Starvation Tactic" in the lower world is still continuing... No matter how important one appears to be... what can authoritative figures do if they can’t even fill their own bellies?

misc.title: People are saying it’s fake… but just look at this. This is the leaked provisional poster from MAPPA that’s been going around, and I’m showing it right here. Also, if you look closely at the bottom, i
misc.text: People are saying it’s fake… but just look at this. This is the leaked provisional poster from MAPPA that’s been going around, and I’m showing it right here. Also, if you look closely at the bottom, it kinda looks like it says “March 29”… 👀 I don’t know, judge for yourselves, but this feels off in a real way. 🩸⚔️ Daily Berserk 𒉭 (@daily_berserk) Berserk is finally getting a new anime adaptation by MAPPA 😳🔥 The announcement dropped just 1 hour ago, and fans are already losing their minds. After all these years… Guts is coming back in the way he deserves. 🩸⚔️ Are we ready for this? — https://nitter.net/daily_berserk/status/2039053928663253083#m

items.text: #ONEPIECE1179 Imu prepares to leave the Holy Land, but three of the Five Elders—Warcury, Ju Peter, and Mars—strongly oppose it. V. Nasjuro and Garling, on the other hand, are resigned to the fact that Imu can’t be stopped. The way the Five Elders are trying to stop Imu suggests that something negative will happen to him if he leaves the Holy Land—especially Pangea Castle: Ju Peter: Imu-sama!! You must not leave “Pangea Castle”!! Imu: I leave the Holy Land in your hands. Elder (I can't specifically identify who said this but its one of the Five Elders): Imu-sama! But you… going down to the lower world is…! Garling: We don’t have the authority to stop him…!! Mars: But…!! Warcury: Imu-sama! If you leave this castle…! V. Nasjuro: We don’t need to remind him of that… Ju Peter: He’s already prepared for it… No one can stop him now… (Imu goes to the center of a big Abyss - the magic circle - and vanishes) ------------------------ Looks like my observation was right. It seems Imu will have some negative effects/demerits (nerf) in leaving the Holy land, hence the blood on his lips at the end of the chapter.
